title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
